title: ADOLESCENT AND CHILD PSYCHIATRY - 211info
text: DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL ADOLESCENT AND CHILD PSYCHIATRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care and consultation for a range of childhood mental health disorders. Services include diagnostic evaluation, parent guidance, child and adolescent therapy/counseling, family therapy/counseling, medication evaluation, and treatment. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 3-19 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 346-0640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 494-8811 Main phone (503) 346-0640 Scheduling (503) 346-0644 Intake (888) 346-0644 Toll-free (503) 494-7551 Emergency (503) 494-2800 Interpreter Services Intake (503) 346-0640 Toll-free (877) 346-0640 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Doernbecher Children's Hospital, lobby level Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance * Mental Health Issues Early Intervention for Mental Illness Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL PUBLIC SAFETY - TOM SARGENT SAFETY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL
